article.body_preview:
DHAKA, June 7, 2023 (BSS) - Federation of Bangladesh Chambers of Commerce and Industry (FBCCI) President Md Jashim Uddin today urged the government to extend policy support towards import-substitute industries in the country to lessen import pressure on foreign exchange.

The FBCCI president made the call while addressing a post-budget discussion as a special guest organized by the Economic Reporters' Forum (ERF) jointly with RAPID and Asia Foundation held at the ERF auditorium at Paltan in the
